scene.message: Tadashi: T-T-T-T-T-Tamaki-{nl} chaaan! I love you!{waitkey}{clearbox}I love you soooo much!!{waitkey}{ret}
Tamaki: Tadashi...{nl} I love you...{waitkey}{ret}
Tadashi: Now,{nl} look into my eyes, my honey♥{waitkey}{ret}
Tamaki: Mm♥{nl} All right, my darling...{waitkey}{ret}
Pinch Tadashi?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Pinch Tamaki?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Tadashi: Uh, huh, huh?{waitkey}{ret}
Tamaki: Eh, wh-why?{waitkey}{ret}
Tadashi: Could you just{nl} leave us be?{waitkey}{ret}
Tamaki: Go away or{nl} I'll get angry.{waitkey}{ret}
